bird.name: 多斑食蜜鸟
bird.summary: 多斑食蜜鸟（台湾作四十斑啄果鳥，学名：Pardalotus quadragintus），是雀形目斑食蜜鸟科斑食蜜鸟属的一种鸟类。 多斑食蜜鸟体重约10.7克，翼长约57.8毫米，嘴峰长约7.6毫米，喙宽度约3.1毫米，喙厚度约3.9毫米，跗蹠长约17.4毫米，尾长约32.3毫米…

relations.subject: 多斑食蜜鸟
relations.evidence: It is listed by the IUCN as endangered, because of its very small range, its highly fragmented distribution and its very small breeding area. Threats include land clearing for sheep farming, low rainfall linked to climate change; bushfires; competitors such as noisy miners and striated pardalotes; predators such as the (introduced) laughing kookaburras; and the native parasitic fly Passeromyia longicornis
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
